subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the All-Bountiful, All-Merciful Lord, worthy and befitting of praise, Whose Ocean of forgiveness surgeth eternally, and Whose Sea of pardon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خداوند کریم رحیمی را لایق و سزا که دریای عفوش لازال مواج و عمان مغفرت و
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consultation
